corrected_fields.summary: This is a chronological archive index page from the NY Fed listing statements on reference rates (SOFR, EFFR, OBFR, Treasury Repo Reference Rates) spanning 2016–2026. It includes IOSCO compliance statements, publication schedule notices, and SOFR methodology modification announcements. The most recent item (March 12, 2026) is a procedural notice regarding publication on April 3, 2026. No single policy decision or substantive new content is presented on this page; individual statements would need to be archived separately for actionable research value.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: SOFR and related reference rates underpin trillions of dollars in derivatives, loans, and securities. This archive documents the evolution of US benchmark rate administration. However, this specific page is an index—each listed statement (SOFR methodology modifications, IOSCO compliance updates, historical rate introductions) warrants individual archival for detailed analysis. The page is useful for locating historical statements but does not itself constitute actionable market intelligence.
corrected_fields.market_structure_context: SOFR, EFFR, OBFR, and Treasury Repo Reference Rates are foundational market structure elements. The archive documents administrative evolution of US overnight financing benchmarks. No new market structure changes are announced on this index page. Individual statements on SOFR methodology modifications (July–November 2024) represent substantive market infrastructure updates that may warrant separate archival.
